name: Collards & Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 15 collard greens, torn into bite-sized pieces, rinsed
10 ounces canned tomatoes, chopped, with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the torn leaves and do not shake or dry them.
2. Place in a pot or pan and wilt.
3. Add Italian seasoning, chopped tomatoes, and continue to heat about 5 minutes.
4. Add as much of the liquid as desired (a large amount makes it into a soup, a small amount makes it into a side dish).
5. Continue heating for 2-3 more minutes until hot and serve.
